endpoint.title: GraphQL endpoint URL
endpoint.description: LeetCode GraphQL endpoint to validate against.

includeOperationNames.title: Include only these operation names
includeOperationNames.description: Optional list of operation names to run. Leave empty to run all.

includeSourcePaths.title: Include only these source paths
includeSourcePaths.description: Optional list of source paths to run (e.g. problem_solve_page/problem_solve_page.graphql).

variablesOverrides.title: Variable Overrides (JSON object)
variablesOverrides.description: Object mapping operation names to custom variable objects. Useful for fetching details for a specific user or question.

includeOperationTypes.title: Include only operation types
includeOperationTypes.description: Filter by operation types. Supported values: query, mutation.

runAllVariableExamples.title: Run all variable examples per operation
runAllVariableExamples.description: If false, only the first variable example is used for each operation.

maxOperations.title: Maximum operations to run
maxOperations.description: Optional hard cap for number of operations (0 means no limit).

requestDelayMs.title: Delay between requests (ms)
requestDelayMs.description: Wait time between checks to reduce burst load.

requestTimeoutSec.title: Request timeout (seconds)
requestTimeoutSec.description: HTTP timeout for each GraphQL request.

headers.title: Custom headers (JSON object)
headers.description: Optional headers to merge into default request headers (e.g. Cookie, x-csrftoken).

failActorIfAnyFail.title: Fail actor when any operation fails
failActorIfAnyFail.description: If true, actor exits with non-zero status when at least one operation fails.
